sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58614" key="kollopeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολλοπ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n58614.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόλλοψ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg008.perseus-grc1:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:186:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">186.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
